 CUSTOMS INVOICE

Shipper:
 Tapio Tainola
 University of Helsinki
 Research Programs Unit
 Translational Cancer Medicine 
 Biomedicum Helsinki, 5th floor, room A510
 Haartmaninkatu 8
 FI-00290, Helsinki, Finland
 Mobile: +358-50-3102636 
 E-mail: Tapio.Tainola@Helsinki.fi


To: Anton Popov
 ESRF Magasin
 71 Avenue des MartyrsVon-Esmarch-Str. 56
 38000. Grenoble
 France
 anton.popov@esrf.fr


Phon: +33-4 76 88 273


Description of Contents:

15 tubes of antibodies

USDA IMPORT:
A. The antibody products are produced in the mouse cell culture supernatant
(source animal)
B. The products was manufactured and processed in a manner to prevent cross
contamination with the BSE related materials
C. The products is for research use only
D. The material does not come from a facility where work with
Exotic viruses affecting livestock and avian species is conducted.
E. The material is not recombinant Or the material is recombinant
But contain genes and expresses no products of exotic livestock or
poultry disease agents.
F. State if the item is Non-infectious and non-contagious
DRY ICE, UN1845, 3 kg

ombinant
But contain genes and expresses no products of exotic livestock or
poultry disease agents.
F. State if the item is Non-infectious and non-contagious
DRY ICE, UN1845, 3 kg
Country of origin: Finland
Value of Shipment: No commercial value, value for customs purposes only 5
USD.
I declare that all information in this invoice to be true and correct.
Helsinki 6.6.2022


 Tapio Tainola
